title: Wandering Illusioner
description: Wandering Traders have a chance to secretly be a disguised Illusioner
body:
# Wandering Illusioner Datapack for Minecraft Java Edition
Make sure to install the Datapack Version that correctly matches your Minecraft Version or issues may arise.

## 📖 About
When a Wandering Trader spawns in your world there is a chance they will secretly be Illusioners.

This pack adds a little more difficulty in your world and it adds the unused Illusioner mob in an uniqe and interesting way.

## 📝 Features
Wandering Traders now have a small chance to be Illusioners in disguise.

There is a button to set the chance a Wandering Trader will secretly be an Illusioner on the pause screen, along with other settings.
**YOU MUST BE OPPED TO USE THESE FEATURES**

<details>
<summary>Behind the Scenes</summary>

Disguised Illusioners will let off smoke particles so you can tell it is a Illusioner before you interact with the Wandering Trader. 
  
Default chance is 50%

Other chances are 25% 10% 5% and 1% and can be changed with the settings on the pause screen if you are opped.

</details>

## ❗Important Information
This mod works very well in addition to [Trader Locator](https://modrinth.com/datapack/trader-locator-atlasplays)

## 📂 Installation
Be sure to install this Datapack to the right location or it will not work properly. 

The *correct* file path is **saves/[world]/datapacks** 

## ℹ️ Extra Information
I now have a Ko-fi link located on the pack’s Modrinth page on the sidebar, but always remember donations are appreciated, but **never** required.

## 👾 Issues
Please report any Datapack issues to the Discord Server, or on the [Github page](https://github.com/The-Atlas-Hub/Wandering-Illusioner/issues).
